status: runner built + gated; AnthropicClient.send is LIVE (Phase G) - the NotImplementedError stop is gone, so the fail-closed run gate (E2E_AB_RUN=1 + E2E_EXTERNAL=1 + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) is the SOLE guard and nothing in-tree opens it. Endpoint = build_break_scope until per-task evaluator test projects are authored.

blinding.note: SAME tool name + output shape in both arms; only the backend content differs.

powered._note: total_runs=40 is the ACTUAL count with the current 4-task corpus (T1/T2/B1/B2 x 5 seeds x 2 arms). target_total_runs=80 is the goal once all 8 target_tasks are authored; configured tasks must exist or the planner fails closed.

thresholds._note: Single source of truth, read by reports/render_report.py. Equals the README pilot signal criterion: adherence < this => non-informative.
